text.title: Programmatic SEO Patterns Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end.

step.name: audit-data-source
step.action: Score completeness, accuracy, refresh cadence; require ≥80 quality.
step.decision-gate: If <80, fix or replace source first.

step.name: set-thin-content-threshold
step.action: ≥300 unique words + ≥2 unique data points + schema or noindex.

step.name: build-link-graph
step.action: Per-page sibling pattern + parent pattern; no orphans.

step.name: ship-and-monitor
step.action: Launch tier 1; monitor crawl + ranking; demote tier-2/3 as needed.
